items.title: Software going headless is inevitable in a world where agents use the tools 100X more tha…

items.description: Software going headless is inevitable in a world where agents use the tools 100X more than people do. And the reality is for a lot of software this is actually a huge boon to potential use-cases for these platforms. Software business model…
